title: Tagine Potato Hash
description: A flavorful breakfast dish that combines crispy potatoes with the rich flavors of tagine. Perfect for a weekend morning.

ingredients.name: Flavorful tagine spice blend
ingredients.notes: available at most Middle Eastern markets

instructions: 2. Peel the potatoes and cut them into 1-inch cubes.
3. In a large bowl, combine the cubed potatoes, tagine spice blend, and salt. Toss to coat.
4. Heat the olive oil in a large oven-safe skillet over medium-high heat.
5. Add the potatoes to the skillet and cook for 5-7 minutes, or until they start to brown.
6. Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and roast the potatoes for 15-20 minutes, or until they're crispy and golden brown.
7. Remove the skillet from the oven and let it cool slightly.
8. Serve the potato hash hot, garnished with chopped parsley if desired.
